hero.badge: A new concept in real estate investment
hero.description: We transform your residential unit into a world-class hospitality destination. Comprehensive management that ensures your peace of mind, maximizes your returns, and delivers an unforgettable stay for our guests.
hero.review: An exceptional experience by every measure. The attention to detail is incredible!

whyUs.subtitle: We combine technology with authentic hospitality to deliver a solution that puts owners at ease and delights guests.
whyUs.feature1Desc: From check-in to check-out, we handle every detail: cleaning, maintenance, and guest reception. Relax and leave the driving to us.
whyUs.feature2Desc: Listed on Booking, Airbnb, and Gathern with the best photos and descriptions to ensure maximum occupancy.
whyUs.feature3Desc: Dynamic pricing algorithms to maximize your profits.
whyUs.feature4Desc: An owner dashboard that shows you exactly where every riyal goes. Track your property performance in real-time with full transparency.
whyUs.feature5Desc: Our team is fully Saudi. We understand our culture and traditions, and we know how to welcome guests with authentic hospitality that reflects our identity and increases guest satisfaction.
whyUs.feature6Desc: 5-star cleaning products and amenities for your guests' comfort.

howItWorks.title: We made it easy for you
howItWorks.subtitle: Our system is designed to take the hassle off your shoulders, not add to it. Three steps separate you from peace of mind.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Your details are simple — send them to us and within 24 hours we'll be at your property for inspection and evaluation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our design and maintenance team transforms the unit 180 degrees to meet international hospitality standards.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We start leasing immediately, and you watch the profits land in your account at the end of each month while you relax.

forOwners.description: Break free from the headaches of traditional renting. Let us take over and turn your property into an income-generating asset with minimal effort from you.
forOwners.benefit1Desc: Insurance and regular maintenance to preserve your asset value.
forOwners.benefit2Desc: Freedom to choose your operating periods.
forOwners.benefit4Desc: No hidden fees, everything is clear.
forOwners.formSubtitle: Fill in the details so we can analyze your property and present the best offer.
forOwners.successMessage: Our owner relations team will contact you soon.
forOwners.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree to our Privacy Policy

forGuests.description: Whether your visit is for business or leisure, our units are designed to give you the feeling of home with the luxury of a hotel. Fast internet, specialty coffee, and peace of mind.
forGuests.feature1Desc: Full sanitization after each guest with high-quality cleaning products.
forGuests.feature2Desc: Instant access to the unit via a private code — no waiting.
forGuests.feature3Desc: Our units are carefully selected in the finest neighborhoods of Riyadh and Jeddah.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about Mnam based on your interest
faq.guestA1: Mnam is a Saudi company specialized in managing and operating residential units, transforming them into luxury serviced apartments. We provide a hotel-grade living experience with complete privacy.
faq.guestQ2: Are the apartments licensed by the Ministry of Tourism?
faq.guestA2: Absolutely. All our units comply with the standards and requirements of the Saudi Ministry of Tourism. We ensure the highest levels of safety and security for our guests.
faq.guestQ3: How can I extend my stay or cancel a booking?
faq.guestA3: Simply contact our direct support team via WhatsApp, or through the platform you booked from. We're very flexible and respect our guests' circumstances.
faq.guestQ4: Is cleaning service available during the stay?
faq.guestA4: Yes, we provide regular hotel-grade cleaning services to ensure your unit stays in top condition throughout your stay with us.
faq.ownerQ1: As an owner, how do I protect my rights and property?
faq.ownerA1: We sign official documented contracts that guarantee regular maintenance and continuous unit cleanliness. We care for your property as if it were our own, because our success comes from yours.
faq.ownerQ2: What sets you apart from traditional agencies?
faq.ownerA2: The difference is 'hotel-grade operations.' We focus on global marketing, daily cleaning, guest reception, and providing a complete experience that increases your property value and income.
faq.ownerQ3: How do I track my unit's performance and profits?
faq.ownerA3: We provide transparent periodic reports showing occupancy rates, financial returns, and maintenance status. Everything is clear and right before your eyes.
faq.ownerQ4: What are the requirements to operate my unit?
faq.ownerA4: Simply, the unit should be in a prime location and in good condition. Our team will inspect the property and suggest an appropriate setup and furnishing plan.

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to start your journey of
footer.ctaSubtitle: Join 250+ property owners achieving exceptional returns with Mnam
footer.description: Saudi Arabia's leader in managing and operating hotel-grade units. We leverage technology and expertise to create an exceptional living experience.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe for the latest news and exclusive offers
footer.copyright: Mnam Residential Unit Management Company. All rights reserved.

legal.termsHtml:
Important Note

At Mnam, we prioritize unit quality to ensure the highest returns for owners and the best experience for guests.

1. Property Ownership & Location

  • A valid electronic title deed or an official power of attorney for property management must be provided.
  • The property must be located in cities currently covered by our services (Riyadh, Jeddah, Al Khobar).
  • The property must be in a fully serviced neighborhood (paved roads, lighting, water, sewage).

2. Unit Readiness

  • The unit must be in excellent structural condition, free of visible defects (leaks, cracks, moisture).
  • Split or central air conditioning in excellent condition installed in all rooms.
  • A fully installed kitchen must be available.

3. Furnishing & Setup (Full Management Package)

For owners opting for the "Full Operations" package, Mnam furnishing standards must be met, including:

  • Use of hotel-grade furnishings (medical mattresses, white cotton linens).
  • A Smart TV and high-speed fiber internet connection must be provided.
  • Smart entry (smart lock) for the main door must be provided.

* The Mnam team can supervise furnishing for an additional fee.

4. Fees & Returns

  • The operational management fee ranges from 20% to 25% of total monthly income.
  • Profits are transferred to the owner by the 10th of each calendar month.
  • The minimum contract period is one calendar year, renewable.
legal.privacyHtml:
At Mnam, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the applicable laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Data Collection

We only collect data necessary to provide our services, such as name, phone number, and property details for owners, or identity details for guests for registration on the "Shumoos" security platform.

Use of Information

Information is used for: managing bookings, improving user experience, communicating about offers or updates, and complying with legal requirements.

Data Sharing

We do not sell your data to third parties. We only share data with government entities upon official request (such as the Ministry of Tourism or the Ministry of Interior).
